title: nephrophyllidium crista-galli subsp. japonicum
intro: Nephrophyllidium crista-galli subsp. japonicum, also known as the Japanese club moss, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Nephrophyllidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Nephrophyllidium crista-galli subsp. japonicum include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
